entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0011 - 12:19:08.527079 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TSOI_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TSOI_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TSOI_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0011.6825] It is expected that AdditionalPaidInCapital with a value of 18,111,652 reported in the network role http://therapeuticsolutionsint.com/role/BalanceSheets should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:AdditionalPaidInCapitalMember and a reported value of 19,675,407 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://therapeuticsolutionsint.com/role/StatementsOfChangesInShareholdersEquityDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:AdditionalPaidInCapital fact are:
Period : 2024-03-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of AdditionalPaidInCapital : 0 Decimals of StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - TSOI_instance_2024_2025.xml 4041
